memoryArtifacts.headline: Britain's Royal Families: The Complete Genealogy By Alison Weir pages 178-180   MALCOLM II to MALDRED son of MALDRED
memoryArtifacts.description:
Malcom II
Father: Kenneth II
Mother: Princess of Leinster
Born in c.954. In his youth, he was styled Prince of Cumbria. He succeeded his cousin Malcolm, son of King Duff, as King of Strathclyde in c.9 …

nameMeanings.name: Waldev
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘god of strength’, name of the elder brother of Krishna, described as wine-loving and irascible. The name is especially favoured by Sikhs.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Waldev of Allerdale was born in 1062, in Northumberland, England, his father, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, was 23 and his mother, Æthelreda of England, was 20. He married Sigrid. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1138, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Waldev of Allerdale est né en 1062, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Æthelreda of England, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Sigrid. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1138, à l’âge de 76 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Waldev of Allerdale è nato il nel 1062 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Æthelreda of England, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Sigrid. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1138, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Waldev of Allerdaleが1062年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Gospatric I Earl of Northumbriaは23歳，母Æthelreda of Englandは20歳であった。Sigridと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1138年に76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Waldev of Allerdale(이)가 1062년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Æthelreda of England(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Sigrid(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1138년 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Waldev of Allerdale родился в 1062 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Æthelreda of England, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Sigrid. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1138 г. в возрасте 76 лет.
